name: Vidalia Onion Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. In a food processor, process onions until finely chopped.
3. Add 1 cup shredded Parmesan cheese, mayonnaise, sour cream, and 2 teaspoons of the dried dill weed; process until well blended.
4. Spoon the mixture into two 9-inch glass pie plates.
5. Sprinkle the tops evenly with the remaining 1/2 cup shredded Parmesan cheese and the remaining 1/2 teaspoon of dried dill weed.
6. Bake for 40 to 45 minutes, or until lightly browned.
7. Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator. Serve at room temperature with chips or crackers, or reheat in the microwave at 80% power for about 3 minutes.
Source: Quick Gifts of Good Taste
